creator: bratanich@mail.ru
text:
Problem with authorizing of users with ldap in freeradius version to the
update of freeradius-2.1.6 renewed ports a version became 2.1.8 1 and at
he starts the start of service well during authorizing he unloads fully,
that is why it is needed to start again.

How-To-Repeat: Started service in debug that writes here

+- entering group authorize {...}
++[preprocess] returns ok
++[chap] returns noop
[mschap] Found MS-CHAP attributes.  Setting 'Auth-Type  = mschap'
++[mschap] returns ok
[suffix] No '@' in User-Name = "a.bratanich", looking up realm NULL
[suffix] No such realm "NULL"
++[suffix] returns noop
[eap] No EAP-Message, not doing EAP
++[eap] returns noop
Assertion failed: (LBER_VALID( ber )), function ber_free_buf, file io.c, line 186.
